title: Unable to access Admin Panel due to unresponsive button
symptom: The 'Admin Panel' button does not respond or leads nowhere, preventing access to administrative settings.
applies_when: Accessing Admin Panel via web interface
not_this_if: Admin Panel is accessible in other instances
Using a different version of n8n
root_cause: The issue may arise from a temporary glitch in the n8n instance or a problem with the web interface that prevents the button from functioning correctly. Restarting the instance can often resolve such issues.
fix_steps: Attempt to access the Admin Panel using the magic link at https://app.n8n.cloud/magic-link
If unsuccessful, request a manual restart of your n8n instance from support.
agent_instruction: Try accessing the Admin Panel using the magic link provided.
